related_to: Data-driven verification, Safe & robust robot control
discovered_from: Contingency-Aware Planning via Certified Neural HJ Reachability (2603.17022); Formal Methods for Robotic Manipulation survey (hal-05533865)
notes: Hamilton-Jacobi reachability provides formal safety guarantees by solving HJ PDEs to compute safe sets. Appeared in multiple papers this week including a neural operator approach to accelerate HJ computation. Closely related to data-driven verification and formal safety methods.

related_to: Data-driven verification, Safe & robust robot control
discovered_from: A General Framework for Robust Quantitative Semantics of STL (chen2026general); STLts-Div (2603.17293); Formal Methods for Robotic Manipulation survey
notes: STL is a widely used specification language for cyber-physical systems and robotics. Three papers this week deal with STL quantitative semantics and trace synthesis. Most relevant as a specification tool for verification tasks; may not be core interest but worth monitoring.

notes: CBFs are a dominant method for safety-critical control and appear in 6+ papers this week across CBF theory, extensions to input delay, mixed constraints, and neural controllers.
